message:
Fix set_profile action by exempting it from ensureChromeRunning()

The set_profile action requires Chrome to be stopped, but ensureChromeRunning()
was being called before all actions, causing Chrome to auto-start and the
profile check to fail.

Solution: Skip ensureChromeRunning() for actions that don't need Chrome:
- SET_PROFILE (must have Chrome stopped)
- GET_PROFILE (just returns config)
- BROWSER_MODE (just returns state)
- HELP (just returns help text)

Fixes Test 4 from testing instructions.

files.patch:
